platform_usage_notes: Use Socrata URL parsing, catalog search, and rows export mechanics only as platform hints.
A Socrata view id can identify a portal dataset page, but it cannot decide whether the dataset satisfies a research need.
Legacy known_source candidates remain compatibility source priors until a route-agent consumer reads neutral platform fragments.
future_verification_hints: Resolve the landing page or view id into a current portal dataset record.
Probe candidate export endpoints before any downstream acquisition step.
Validate rows, fields, geography, time coverage, and portal metadata outside this platform package.
